task_completion.description: Log in to the SEB Server
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SEB Server login screen being filled out or the dashboard visible after a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target exam 'Intro to Psychology 101'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Exams' list or menu with 'Intro to Psychology 101' selected, or the exam's specific details/edit page open.

task_completion.description: Change the linked SEB Configuration to 'Calculator Permitted Config'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SEB Configuration dropdown or selection field for the exam set to 'Calculator Permitted Config'.

task_completion.description: Extend the exam duration by setting the End Date to 2026-06-15
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the End Date input field or date picker for the exam set to '2026-06-15'.

task_completion.description: Extend the exam duration by setting the End Time to 14:00
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the End Time input field or time picker for the exam set to '14:00'.
Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save' or 'Update' button, followed by a success message, toast notification, or the updated exam details page reflecting the new configuration and end time.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the SEB Server interface, rather than terminal windows using curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine SEB Server web application interface, not a text editor modifying HTML or configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show SQL clients, terminal database prompts, or scripts being used to directly update the backend database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target exam is 'Intro to Psychology 101'. The agent must update its linked SEB Configuration to 'Calculator Permitted Config'. The exam's End Date must be set to '2026-06-15' and the End Time must be set to '14:00'.
